description: GPA recovery of the shared subspace under structured LoRA-like perturbations.
protocol_note: A* is built with geometrically decaying singular values and each adapter receives a task-specific rank-1 perturbation before rotation and noise. Subspace overlap is measured from the dominant row spaces of the GPA consensus and the shared ground-truth matrix via principal angles.

shared_subspace_check.description: Mean dominant-subspace overlap should remain high for low-to-moderate task-specific perturbations.
